title: Hockey-stick Harvest Control Rule — hockeystick.hcr
text: function implements hockey-stick shaped harvest control rule (HCR). commonly used set F effort, sometimes catch, measure stock status, estimated SSB depletion. function can take input, 'metric', can computed FLStock returned function run 'est' step. 'output' argument can set quantity OM projection method can understand, e.g. fbar, effort catch 'fwd.om'. HCR increases control variable linearly lower threshold (lim) trigger point (trigger), sets target level (target) metric trigger. decreasing line can cut point ('drop'), output values fall 'min' level set. See examples . function can also apply optional upper (dupp) lower (dlow) constraints changes control variable. constraints can applied either unconditionally (= TRUE) stock trigger.
